lines.english: Lesson 38
lines.chinese: 第38课
lines.raw: Lesson 38 | 第38课

lines.english: Water and the traveller
lines.chinese: 水与旅行者
lines.raw: Water and the traveller | 水与旅行者

lines.english: What does this text describe?
lines.chinese: 本文描述了什么？
lines.raw: What does this text describe? | 本文描述了什么？

lines.english: Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation close to water sources,
lines.chinese: 供水污染通常是由于水源附近卫生条件差，
lines.raw: Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation close to water sources, | 供水污染通常是由于水源附近卫生条件差，

lines.english: sewage disposal into the sources themselves, leakage of sewage into distribution systems or contamination with industrial or farm waste.
lines.chinese: 污水直接排入水源，污水泄漏进入分配系统，或受到工业或农业废物的污染。
lines.raw: sewage disposal into the sources themselves, leakage of sewage into distribution systems or contamination with industrial or farm waste. | 污水直接排入水源，污水泄漏进入分配系统，或受到工业或农业废物的污染。

lines.english: Even if a piped water supply is safe at its source, it is not always safe by the time it reaches the tap.
lines.chinese: 即使管道供水在其源头是安全的，但当它到达水龙头时，也并非总是安全的。
lines.raw: Even if a piped water supply is safe at its source, it is not always safe by the time it reaches the tap. | 即使管道供水在其源头是安全的，但当它到达水龙头时，也并非总是安全的。

lines.english: Intermittent tap-water supplies should be regarded as particularly suspect.
lines.chinese: 间歇性自来水供应应被视为特别可疑。
lines.raw: Intermittent tap-water supplies should be regarded as particularly suspect. | 间歇性自来水供应应被视为特别可疑。

lines.english: Travellers on short trips to areas with water supplies of uncertain quality
lines.chinese: 短途旅行到水质不确定地区的旅行者
lines.raw: Travellers on short trips to areas with water supplies of uncertain quality | 短途旅行到水质不确定地区的旅行者

lines.english: should avoid drinking tap-water, or untreated water from any other source.
lines.chinese: 应避免饮用自来水，或任何其他来源的未经处理的水。
lines.raw: should avoid drinking tap-water, or untreated water from any other source. | 应避免饮用自来水，或任何其他来源的未经处理的水。

lines.english: It is best to keep to hot drinks, bottled or canned drinks of well-known brand names-international standard of water treatment are usually followed at bottling plants.
lines.chinese: 最好只喝热饮、知名品牌的瓶装或罐装饮料——瓶装厂通常会遵循国际水处理标准。
lines.raw: It is best to keep to hot drinks, bottled or canned drinks of well-known brand names-international standard of water treatment are usually followed at bottling plants. | 最好只喝热饮、知名品牌的瓶装或罐装饮料——瓶装厂通常会遵循国际水处理标准。

lines.english: Carbonated drinks are acidic, and slightly safer.
lines.chinese: 碳酸饮料呈酸性，稍微安全一些。
lines.raw: Carbonated drinks are acidic, and slightly safer. | 碳酸饮料呈酸性，稍微安全一些。

lines.english: Make sure that all bottles are opened in your presence, and that their rims are clean and dry.
lines.chinese: 确保所有瓶子都是在你面前打开的，并且瓶口清洁干燥。
lines.raw: Make sure that all bottles are opened in your presence, and that their rims are clean and dry. | 确保所有瓶子都是在你面前打开的，并且瓶口清洁干燥。

lines.english: Boiling is always a good way of treating water.
lines.chinese: 煮沸始终是处理水的好方法。
lines.raw: Boiling is always a good way of treating water. | 煮沸始终是处理水的好方法。

lines.english: Some hotels supply boiled water on request and this can be used for drinking, or for brushing teeth.
lines.chinese: 有些酒店应要求提供开水，可用于饮用或刷牙。
lines.raw: Some hotels supply boiled water on request and this can be used for drinking, or for brushing teeth. | 有些酒店应要求提供开水，可用于饮用或刷牙。

lines.english: Portable boiling elements that can boil small quantities of water are useful when the right voltage of electricity is available.
lines.chinese: 当有合适的电压时，能烧开少量水的便携式电热棒会很有用。
lines.raw: Portable boiling elements that can boil small quantities of water are useful when the right voltage of electricity is available. | 当有合适的电压时，能烧开少量水的便携式电热棒会很有用。

lines.english: Refuse politely any cold drink from an unknown source.
lines.chinese: 礼貌地拒绝任何来源不明的冷饮。
lines.raw: Refuse politely any cold drink from an unknown source. | 礼貌地拒绝任何来源不明的冷饮。

lines.english: Ice is only as safe as the water from which it is made,
lines.chinese: 冰的安全性取决于制作它的水，
lines.raw: Ice is only as safe as the water from which it is made, | 冰的安全性取决于制作它的水，

lines.english: and should not be put in drinks unless it is known to be safe.
lines.chinese: 除非已知其安全，否则不应将其放入饮料中。
lines.raw: and should not be put in drinks unless it is known to be safe. | 除非已知其安全，否则不应将其放入饮料中。

lines.english: Drinks can be cooled by placing them on ice rather than adding ice to them.
lines.chinese: 饮料可以通过放在冰块上冷却，而不是将冰块加入饮料中。
lines.raw: Drinks can be cooled by placing them on ice rather than adding ice to them. | 饮料可以通过放在冰块上冷却，而不是将冰块加入饮料中。

lines.english: Alcohol may be a medical disinfectant, but should not be relied upon to sterilize water.
lines.chinese: 酒精可能是医用消毒剂，但不应指望它能给水消毒。
lines.raw: Alcohol may be a medical disinfectant, but should not be relied upon to sterilize water. | 酒精可能是医用消毒剂，但不应指望它能给水消毒。

lines.english: Ethanol is more effective at a concentration of 50-70 percent;
lines.chinese: 乙醇在50-70%的浓度下更有效；
lines.raw: Ethanol is more effective at a concentration of 50-70 percent; | 乙醇在50-70%的浓度下更有效；

lines.english: below 20 per cent, its bactericidal action is negligible.
lines.chinese: 低于20%时，其杀菌作用微乎其微。
lines.raw: below 20 per cent, its bactericidal action is negligible. | 低于20%时，其杀菌作用微乎其微。

lines.english: Spirits labelled 95 proof contain only about 47 per cent alcohol.
lines.chinese: 标示为95度的烈酒只含有大约47%的酒精。
lines.raw: Spirits labelled 95 proof contain only about 47 per cent alcohol. | 标示为95度的烈酒只含有大约47%的酒精。

lines.english: Beware of methylated alcohol,
lines.chinese: 警惕工业酒精（甲醇变性酒精），
lines.raw: Beware of methylated alcohol, | 警惕工业酒精（甲醇变性酒精），

lines.english: which is very poisonous and should never be added to drinking water.
lines.chinese: 它剧毒，绝不应加入饮用水中。
lines.raw: which is very poisonous and should never be added to drinking water. | 它剧毒，绝不应加入饮用水中。

lines.english: If no other safe water supply can be obtained,
lines.chinese: 如果无法获得其他安全水源，
lines.raw: If no other safe water supply can be obtained, | 如果无法获得其他安全水源，

lines.english: tap water that is too hot to touch can be left to cool and is generally safe to drink.
lines.chinese: 热得烫手的自来水可以放凉后饮用，通常是安全的。
lines.raw: tap water that is too hot to touch can be left to cool and is generally safe to drink. | 热得烫手的自来水可以放凉后饮用，通常是安全的。

lines.english: Those planning a trip to remote areas, or intending to live in countries where drinking water is not readily available,
lines.chinese: 计划去偏远地区旅行，或打算生活在饮用水不易获得的国家的人，
lines.raw: Those planning a trip to remote areas, or intending to live in countries where drinking water is not readily available, | 计划去偏远地区旅行，或打算生活在饮用水不易获得的国家的人，

lines.english: should know about the various possible methods for making water safe.
lines.chinese: 应该了解使水安全可饮用的各种可能方法。
lines.raw: should know about the various possible methods for making water safe. | 应该了解使水安全可饮用的各种可能方法。
